examples: I can't help feeling slightly wistful about the perks I'm giving up.

Instead of casting a wistful glance 10 at all the species we've left in the dust I.Q.-wise, it implicitly asks what the real 11 of our own intelligence might be.
He could be prickly, too -- and thoughtful, and bitter, and expansive, and wistful.
It made me a little wistful as I thought back to my own days in marketing.
